item.title: Version 1.0.18
item.description:
<!-- Release notes generated using configuration in .github/release.yml at v1.0.18 -->
## What's Changed ### Other Changes * Make Homebrew cask update workflow manual by @char1eslu in https://github.com/ggbond268/MacTools/pull/131 * feat(translator): add screenshot OCR translation by @rkrkrkk in https://github.com/ggbond268/MacTools/pull/132 * Feat: Launchpad custom ordering + iOS-style folders (#19a/#19b) by @Goldenmonstew in https://github.com/ggbond268/MacTools/pull/134 * fix(l10n): remove unnecessary line break in about description by @YangFong in https://github.com/ggbond268/MacTools/pull/133
## New Contributors * @YangFong made their first contribution in https://github.com/ggbond268/MacTools/pull/133
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ggbond268/MacTools/compare/v1.0.17...v1.0.18
